plans.title: V1.23 Architecture & Crate Wiring Alignment — align knowledge specs, entity scopes, and actual crate graph
plans.notes: Batch A (T1-T4) complete. Prepare phase done: specify=pass, clarify=pass, plan=pass. Ready for Batch B implementation.

metadata.description: Reconcile OSS knowledge specs with actual crates, define entity scope ownership, wire previously split domain crates into product paths, and add drift guards.
metadata.branch_policy: single integration branch created from main; PR to main

batches.name: A — Spec clarification (Prepare)
batches.notes: Entity scope model created; crate architecture and CLI terminology reconciled; ARCHITECTURE.md updated. Commits: 0113773, 41df982, 74708b8

batches.name: B — Minimal domain interfaces
batches.notes: KnowledgeStore, KbStore, NarrativeGateway traits defined; contract enums deduplicated. 176 tests. Commits: 4828dcb, dda3bc0, 5fe5511, ac57d83

batches.name: C — Runtime wiring
batches.notes: cloud-sync→cloud-domain wired; moment-assembly→narrative/kb/knowledge wired; daemon 5 missing deps fixed; creator kb terminology clarified. 700+ tests. Commits: 220608c, 4a6f646, 44c0fc2, ebb2e1b

batches.name: D — Persistence and migration cleanup
batches.notes: Audit and move storage ownership to correct crates.

batches.name: E — Tests, graph guards, docs
batches.notes: Drift guards, integration tests, full verification, QC tri-review.

plans.title: V1.22 CLI Deprecation Cleanup — remove all deprecated commands, dead code, stale redirects
plans.notes: Batches A–E complete. QC tri-review 3× Approve. QA Pass (700/700). PR #30 merged.

metadata.branch_policy: single integration branch — all batches merge to feature branch then PR to main
metadata.description: Remove ~18 deprecated CLI top-level commands, their implementations, deprecated runtime redirects, obsolete tests, and dead imports accumulated across V1.2–V1.18.

batches.name: A — Extract shared utilities
batches.notes: Move init utils to creator.rs, schedule runner to daemon.rs. Commit: 9397641

batches.name: B — Delete deprecated modules
batches.notes: ~5,300 lines removed + 6 modules restructured to dir modules. Commit: 84d6f4a

batches.name: C — Clean up imports and references
batches.notes: cli.rs 18→8 commands, main.rs cleaned, tests updated. Commit: aa35218

batches.name: D — Test cleanup and verification
batches.notes: 700+ tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean. Commit: aa35218

batches.name: E — Architect audit fixes
batches.notes: Clippy 39→0, stale CLI paths updated, deprecated removed, legacy scaffolding cleaned. Commit: 2528f10

cross_cutting.title: rand 0.7.3 cannot be upgraded — blocked by wiremock → http-types upstream
cross_cutting.note: Blocked by wiremock → http-types upstream. Removed from V1.6 scope per V1.6 delivery compass decision.
